username.too-big: Username is too big. Max 20 characters
username.shortUsername: Username must be at least 2 characters long
username.usernameStartsOrEnds: Username can't start or end with a dot or hyphen
username.usernameMultipleChars: Username cannot contain consecutive dots or hyphens

email.shortEmail: Email username (before the @) must be at least 6 characters
email.emailStructure: Email must follow this format: username@domain.tld
email.shortTLD: Domain extension must be at least 2 characters long

password.shortPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long
password.weakPassword: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character

form.submit: Error submitting the form. Try again

avatar.too-big: The image provided is very large. Max 250kb
avatar.invalid: The image provided is invalid. Supported types: jpeg, png or webp
